name: Flagright
description: Flagright is an API-first platform for transaction monitoring, fraud prevention, customer risk assessment and sanctions screening with no-code rule building. It is aimed at neobanks, payment companies and crypto businesses looking for fast

seo.title: Flagright — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: Flagright: Flagright is an API-first platform for transaction monitoring, fraud prevention, customer risk assessment and sanctions screening with no-code rule b

when_to_use: Real-time transaction monitoring for neobank AML compliance
No-code rule builder for custom fraud detection policies
Sanctions screening integration for crypto payment platforms
Customer risk scoring API for dynamic AML risk profiles
SAR filing workflow automation for financial crime reporting

pros: API-first AML and fraud in one platform
Good fit for crypto and neobank flows
cons: Younger vendor vs Actimize or Feedzai
Smaller reference base in tier-1 banks
Scaling on complex alert workflows unproven
review.verdict: A solid modern pick for neobanks and crypto teams who want AML plus fraud without an enterprise RFP.
review.best_for: Neobanks, PSPs and crypto firms needing fast AML and transaction monitoring via API.
review.not_for: Global tier-1 banks with dense regulatory expectations and heavy case volume.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
